title: centaurea × chrysomicranthos
intro: Centaurea × chrysomicranthos is a hybrid plant, a cross between Centaurea cyanus and Chrysanthemum segetum, commonly known as cornflower and marguerite, respectively. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Centaurea × chrysomicranthos can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for a convenient and accessible way to harness its medicinal properties.
